justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions, including specific dates and times, and adjusted search parameters accordingly.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently offered alternative days or times when the requested slot was unavailable, but sometimes offered only two options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently processed all user requests without asking for redundant information or making unnecessary turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was generally smooth and professional, though the repeated apologies for unavailability could be slightly improved.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained full context throughout the conversation, even when the user changed their mind about preferred days and times.
